snippets.title: Looks good, continue
snippets.body: Looks good to me. Continue with the next concrete step.

snippets.title: Run tests
snippets.body: Run the relevant test suite, summarize failures first, then fix any deterministic failure you introduced.

snippets.title: Review own diff
snippets.body: Review your current diff for correctness, regressions, missing tests, and accidental unrelated changes before finishing.

snippets.title: Check blocker
snippets.body: Re-check the blocking condition. If it is resolved, update ticket/HITL status and continue without waiting.

snippets.title: Commit and push
snippets.body: Commit the completed change with a concise message, push it, and report the exact verification that passed.
